metadata.title: Prototype — Remix
metadata.description: Remix's prototyping environment lets you move fast — from blank file to deployed contract without leaving your browser.

hero.description: Remix's prototyping environment lets you move fast — from blank file to deployed contract without leaving your browser.

workflow.title: Prototype Workflow
workflow.description: Five steps from concept to testnet deployment.

steps.title: Pick a Template
steps.description: Start from an OpenZeppelin standard or blank file.

steps.title: Write & Compile
steps.description: Edit Solidity with AI autocomplete and inline hints.

steps.title: Test In-Browser
steps.description: Deploy to Remix VM for instant feedback.

steps.title: Script & Automate
steps.description: Use the Script Runner to wire up complex flows.

steps.title: Deploy to Testnet
steps.description: Push to Sepolia, Polygon, or any EVM chain.

items.title: Start from Templates
items.description: Choose from OpenZeppelin standards, ERC tokens, DeFi primitives, and community-contributed templates. Skip the boilerplate.

items.title: In-Browser EVM
items.description: Deploy and test against a full Ethereum node running entirely in your browser. No external RPC, no cost.

items.title: Fork Any Network
items.description: Fork mainnet, testnets, or any EVM-compatible chain directly in Remix. Test against real on-chain state.

items.title: Script Runner
items.description: Automate deployment flows with TypeScript or JavaScript scripts. Compose complex transactions in a single file.

items.title: Compile & Run
items.description: Write a script that compiles, deploys, and calls a contract — run it in one click. Set state as you code.

items.title: Workspace Templates
items.description: New workspace modal with Hardhat, Foundry, OpenZeppelin Wizard, and AI-generated boilerplate options.
